title: daemon store: get_contacts(None) unbounded — OOM on ChatContact/get with ids=null
description: daemon/src/store.rs get_contacts(ids=None) (line 1261) issues SELECT with no LIMIT over chat_contact. Called from JMAP ChatContact/get when the client passes ids=null (return all). On a daemon with thousands of contacts this returns the entire table into a Vec<ChatContactRow> in memory. Similarly query_contacts() (line 1325) has no LIMIT — called from ChatContact/query and ChatContact/changes. Fix: enforce a server-side LIMIT (e.g. 256 or 4096 per RFC 8620 §5.1 maxObjectsInGet) on both paths.
notes: Part of security review round 23 (epic nie-nvk2)
